mission.title: containerd: cgroups v2 Support
mission.description: cgroups v2 Support. Requested by 26+ users.

steps.title: Check current containerd deployment
steps.description:
Verify your containerd version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd
helm list -n containerd 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working containerd installation.

steps.title: Review containerd configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant containerd configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd
kubectl get configmap -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=containerd
```
Work needs to be done to the cgroups lib and containerd metrics interfaces to support cgroups v2 support.

steps.title: Apply the fix for cgroups v2 Support
steps.description:
* only shim v2 runc v2 ("io.containerd.runc.v2") is supported
* only PID metrics is implemented. Others should be implemented in separate PRs.
* lots of code duplication in v1 metrics and v2 metrics. Dedupe should be separate PR.
* Tested with both runc and crun on git master

See the fix PR for details: linked PR

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd
kubectl get events -n containerd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "cgroups v2 Support" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
* only shim v2 runc v2 ("io.containerd.runc.v2") is supported
* only PID metrics is implemented. Others should be implemented in separate PRs.
* lots of code duplication in v1 metrics and v2 metrics. Dedupe should be separate PR.
* Tested with both runc and crun on git master

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with containerd installed or the issue environment reproducible.
